horoscope: Energies are not particularly grounding, dear Aries, with a Sun-Jupiter square in play that can lead to some high expectations. It's temporarily hard to balance what you want to do with what you feel you should do for better physical and mental health. However, it may be precisely what you should be working on right now. This transit can stir restlessness or, perhaps more aptly, highlight discontent that's already there, but in hiding. You can be particularly moody when it comes to family matters. If this discontent inspires you to take action, then it's productive and supportive, but if it leaves you hanging and feeling listless, then you might want to remind yourself that what you have now is likely enough for the moment. Others might come up with wild ideas, but avoid putting your faith in promises made to you right now.

Today's Sun-Jupiter square can stir some restlessness, dear Taurus, ideally leading to positive change down the road. Jupiter is currently on a mission to add more special activities and mental engagement to your life, but the Sun is reminding you of your vital need for downtime. With this clash highlighted, it can be difficult to discipline yourself today. Ideally, the discontent you feel now leads to legitimate efforts to make improvements and bring about better conditions in your life. If not, this aspect can sometimes lead to wastefulness or random indulgences. Aim to take stock of your accomplishments and determine where adjustments may be needed or perhaps whether to change course. While expansion is often the go-to with Jupiter prominent, moderation in your approach will get you further. Aim to think big, but when mapping plans out, be realistic with your expectations.

A Sun-Jupiter square today can play with your judgment in spots, dear Gemini. Recent excesses have a way of catching up with you. You can be in a generous mood, but perhaps you are a little overconfident now, and overspending and even overstating can be a problem. Instead, feeling overwhelmed can leave you spinning your wheels, which might lead to waste and a lack of productivity. Expectations are high, but the desire to put forth effort is temporarily low, which is a significant mismatch. It's not a good time to rely on your impressions, since an inflated mood can distort your perceptions. However, it's a good time to think big and stretch your imagination.

Today's Sun-Jupiter square, dear Cancer, judgment may not be perfect temporarily. Improving your life and rising to challenges can be satisfying these days, but there can be some resistance or blocks today that hint it's not yet the best time to push forward and enforce your will. Adjustments are necessary. Tensions can stem from impatience with rules and regulations or a desire to go your own way when the world seems to want something else! Missing details or overshooting can lead to errors. Aim to center yourself, as the tendency is to scatter your attention and energies, which can work against you. The risk of going over the top is high right now. For best results, avoid exaggeration and arrogance, which can be much easier to do later today.

You could feel overwhelmed with things to do that get in the way of what you're truly interested in, dear Leo. Mistakes made today tend to result from boredom or restlessness that distracts you from the tasks at hand. You might go overboard helping someone or doing things for others, and then feel a little resentful that you didn't attend to your own needs. Aim to get in better touch with your true desires before taking action today, and think in terms of making adjustments and compromises before going forward. Certainly, you can feel torn between downtime and learning or non-routine activities, but once you relax and find a compromise, it's a fine time to stretch your mind and open yourself to possibilities.

A craving for more meaning or excitement in your life can figure strongly today, dear Virgo, with the Sun square Jupiter. However, overshooting the mark is a strong possibility with this transit in play. Something is premature now. Aim to prioritize or allow yourself some distance from a matter so that you can return to it refreshed and with more objectivity. If your expectations need some adjusting, doing so can help reduce the pressure. Avoid taking on too much, as this time of year is more about beginning to see some flaws in a plan or goal, and while this can bring on some moodiness, your best bet is to look for inconsistencies and adjust expectations. You may be going after something too quickly, for example, and adjusting your expectations about when you'll finish can help you see things more realistically. If you've been stretching yourself too thin, you may need to hunker down and define your priorities -- something tomorrow's energy will help considerably.

A Sun-Jupiter square today can play with your perceptions in spots, dear Libra. Restlessness can either motivate you to make improvements or lead you astray! This transit has a way of showing you where you're not meeting your expectations. Try not to avoid allowing impulses to rule, as they are unlikely to lead you down the right path at the moment. Of course, something good may come of your mood, especially if you avoid overdoing it and instead conserve your energy. This way, you'll have a better idea of your next step. Consider that overdoing things won't work in your favor today--you'll only serve to exhaust yourself. Conserve your energy for a better time to move forward, when real opportunities are available.

With a Sun-Jupiter square today, dear Scorpio, circumstances may seem to challenge you to break out of a rut or pattern that has prevented you from growing. Aim to be mindful, for if you act without self-awareness, you may take risks, overpay, or jump into (or leave) something too quickly. You may want to do it all today, but a moderate approach makes better sense. Aim to stretch your mind while keeping one foot on the ground. You might feel overwhelmed by possibilities today, or so overwhelmed that you don't know where to begin. When this happens, it's a good idea to start with something small before moving on to bigger things. Part of you wants to go out and conquer the world, but without a solid plan, you could be feeling unsatisfied. It would be wise to avoid shopping right now. Tomorrow brings more coherent, steady energy.

Bonding with someone is likely to take place on a mental level today, dear Sagittarius. While it's not a time for getting definite answers, there is so much activity, interest, and intrigue going on that you can't help but enjoy yourself. With the Sun in your pleasure sector, you're seeking special ways to express yourself, but it clashes with Jupiter today, and Jupiter is in a far less playful or spontaneous area of your solar chart. Problems today come from overestimating your (or life's) capabilities, or from overblown egos and expectations. Your eyes are opening to areas of life that need improvement, and you can be excited about making changes. At the same time, it may be best to resist the urge to rebel or react impulsively if things are not going as expected.

Today's Sun-Jupiter square can play with your mood, in spots, dear Capricorn. Your expectations can leave you feeling vulnerable to mood swings if you've set them too high recently, primarily related to your relationships. Listen to what others are saying, but stay centered enough to communicate your feelings. Do keep in mind that while people are prone to exaggeration today, in general, whatever they're experiencing seems real to them. Still, it's best not to rely on someone's promises. Don’t let others goad you unless you do need a push to get going! Decision-making can be complex today, with your instincts telling you one thing and people in your life telling you another. It may be better to take things easy.

With today's Sun-Jupiter square, routine seems to bring out the worst in you, dear Aquarius, as it can remind you of your discontent. Or, you may feel overloaded. Avoid the trap of overdoing something, as it will only aggravate the problem. But while today isn't ideal for productivity, the stirrings you feel now may prompt you to make valuable changes. Even so, you can have big ideas now, but they may prove to be too grandiose later. The things people say could grate on your nerves. If you keep your sense of humor (and common sense), it can be a strong day for personal influence.

With the Sun and Jupiter forming a square today, dear Pisces, instincts for financial matters may be out of step, making it a good idea to postpone big purchases. The temptation to borrow from the future is strong and probably should be tamed. Emotions are up and down, and it's best not to become swept away by promises. You're a little restless and curious, and you should probably resist the urge to react impulsively if things are not going the way you expected them to. Be especially careful that you don't overstate or commit to something that you may later regret. A disagreement on a money, business, or ownership matter could be in the spotlight. Emotions can run high when it comes to money and personal belongings, but also basic values and worth. If others seem to be disrespecting you, you can take it especially personally today. Life feels less up and down later today, when your bigger priorities come into stronger focus.
